theory.intro: If you know the value of a fractional part of a whole, you can work back to find the whole. This reverses 'fraction of a quantity'.
facts: If $\tfrac{a}{b}$ of the whole equals a value, then **one part $\tfrac{1}{b}$ = value $\div a$**.
The whole is made of $b$ equal parts, so **whole = one part $\times b$**.
A tape diagram split into $b$ segments, with $a$ shaded equalling the known value, makes the whole visible.
steps: Find the value of one part: divide the known amount by its numerator.
Multiply one part by the denominator.
